description: Perform a comparative study on the impact of Prandtl Tip Loss correction on a HAWT rotor. Using a NACA 4418 airfoil (360-degree polar, XFoil Re=1M, Ncrit=9, -5 to 20 deg), design a 3-blade rotor (Radius=5m, Hub=0.5m, Linear Chord 0.8m to 0.3m, Linear Twist 15deg to 0deg). Run two BEM simulations at 10m/s wind speed (TSR sweep 1-12, step 0.5) named 'BEM_TipLoss_ON' (Prandtl Tip Loss enabled) and 'BEM_TipLoss_OFF' (Prandtl Tip Loss disabled). Save the project to '~/Documents/projects/tip_loss_study.wpa' and create a report at '~/Documents/tip_loss_report.txt' comparing the Maximum Cp and corresponding CT for both cases, including the percentage increase when tip loss is ignored.
